AccountDataExportResponse.description: GDPR data portability export containing all user data.
AccountDataExportResponse.title: AccountDataExportResponse

analog_dates.description: Up to 5 representative analog dates (subset of all analogs used).
analog_dates.title: Analog Dates

analog_dates_shown.description: Number of analog dates included in analog_dates (max 5).
analog_dates_shown.title: Analog Dates Shown

analog_dates_total.description: Total number of analogs used in the forecast calculation.
analog_dates_total.title: Analog Dates Total

next_cursor.description: Opaque cursor for keyset pagination. Pass this value as `cursor` on the next request to fetch the next page.
next_cursor.title: Next Cursor

total.description: Total number of matching records for the current filters before page slicing. This value does not shrink after applying a cursor.
total.title: Total

equity_curve_points_omitted.description: Number of persisted equity points omitted from the returned equity-curve slice.
equity_curve_points_omitted.title: Equity Curve Points Omitted

risk_free_rate.description: Annualized scalar risk-free-rate anchor recorded with the run. For curve-based runs this is the default or starting rate, not every daily Treasury point used during execution. Null only when the value could not be determined (very old runs).
risk_free_rate.title: Risk Free Rate

risk_free_rate_curve_points.description: Per-date risk-free-rate points used for curve-based execution when they were persisted with the run. Empty for scalar runs or older runs that predate curve snapshot persistence.
risk_free_rate_curve_points.title: Risk Free Rate Curve Points

risk_free_rate_model.description: Whether the run used a single scalar risk-free rate or a date-varying curve with this value as the anchor/default.
risk_free_rate_model.title: Risk Free Rate Model

summary_provenance.description: Indicates that summary metrics were serialized from persisted run aggregates, not recomputed from returned trade or equity slices.
summary_provenance.title: Summary Provenance

trade_items_omitted.description: Number of persisted trades omitted from the returned trade slice.
trade_items_omitted.title: Trade Items Omitted

BacktestRunHistoryItemResponse.description:
History item for backtest runs. The ``summary`` field does not exist on the
ORM model; this schema requires manual construction in the service layer
(see BacktestService._to_history_item). Do not use from_attributes.

summary_provenance.description: Indicates that summary metrics were serialized from persisted run aggregates, not recomputed from returned trade or equity slices.
summary_provenance.title: Summary Provenance

BacktestRunHistoryItemResponse.title: BacktestRunHistoryItemResponse

next_cursor.description: Opaque cursor for keyset pagination. Pass this value as `cursor` on the next request to fetch the next page.
next_cursor.title: Next Cursor

total.description: Total number of matching records for the current filters before page slicing. This value does not shrink after applying a cursor.
total.title: Total

BacktestSummaryResponse.description:
Backtest summary metrics.

DUAL-PURPOSE: This schema is used for BOTH ORM mapping (``from_attributes=True``
on BacktestRunDetailResponse) AND manual construction from JSON blobs
(scanner/sweep ``summary_json`` fields). Fields like ``decided_trades``
that don't exist on the ORM model will silently default to ``None``.
Do not add validators that assume ORM context - they will break the
JSON construction path.

decided_trades.description: Trades with non-zero net P&L. Win rate denominator. Equals trade_count minus break-even trades.
decided_trades.title: Decided Trades

BacktestSummaryResponse.title: BacktestSummaryResponse

detail_json.description: Trade leg details. May be large for multi-leg strategies.
detail_json.title: Detail Json

entry_mid.description: Per-unit position value divided by 100 (contract multiplier). NOT the raw option mid-price. To reconstruct cost: value x 100 x quantity.
entry_mid.title: Entry Mid

exit_mid.description: Per-unit position value at exit divided by 100. Same convention as entry_mid.
exit_mid.title: Exit Mid

holding_period_days.description: Calendar days between entry and exit dates.
holding_period_days.title: Holding Period Days

holding_period_trading_days.description: Trading days (market-open days) held. None for wheel strategy.
holding_period_trading_days.title: Holding Period Trading Days

idempotency_key.description: Optional client-generated key for retry-safe analysis creation. Reusing the key returns the existing analysis job rather than creating a duplicate.
idempotency_key.title: Idempotency Key

dividend_yield.description: Annualized dividend yield for BSM IV estimation (e.g. 0.03 = 3%). Improves IV accuracy for high-yield stocks. Defaults to 0.0.
dividend_yield.title: Dividend Yield

end_date.description: Backtest end date. Must be after start_date.
end_date.title: End Date

entry_rules.description: Entry rules for the backtest. Internal scan/sweep flows may intentionally use an empty list; the public create-backtest API rejects empty entry_rules.
entry_rules.title: Entry Rules

idempotency_key.description: Optional client-generated key for retry-safe create semantics. Reusing the same payload/key returns the existing queued/running/completed job instead of creating a duplicate.
idempotency_key.title: Idempotency Key

max_holding_days.description: Maximum holding period in trading days (weekdays only). 30 trading days ~= 6 calendar weeks.
max_holding_days.title: Max Holding Days

profit_target_pct.description: Close position when unrealized profit reaches this percentage of capital at risk. None disables.
profit_target_pct.title: Profit Target Pct

risk_free_rate.description: Annualized risk-free rate for Sharpe/Sortino calculations. If not provided, resolves from Massive Treasury yields for the backtest window and falls back to the configured server default if Massive is unavailable. Set to 0.0 for ZIRP-era backtests.
risk_free_rate.title: Risk Free Rate

slippage_pct.description: Slippage percentage applied to entry and exit prices.
slippage_pct.title: Slippage Pct

start_date.description: Backtest start date. Maximum window is 1825 days (5 years) from end_date.
start_date.title: Start Date

stop_loss_pct.description: Close position when unrealized loss reaches this percentage of capital at risk. None disables.
stop_loss_pct.title: Stop Loss Pct

strategy_overrides.description: Optional overrides for strike placement and spread width

symbol.description: Ticker symbol (e.g., AAPL, SPY). Uppercase letters, dots, and slashes allowed.
symbol.title: Symbol

idempotency_key.description: Optional client-generated key for retry-safe export creation. Retries with the same key return the existing export job instead of creating duplicates.
idempotency_key.title: Idempotency Key

idempotency_key.description: Optional client-generated key for retry-safe create semantics. Reusing the same key lets the API return or repair the existing job instead of creating a duplicate scan.
idempotency_key.title: Idempotency Key

idempotency_key.description: Optional client-generated key for retry-safe sweep creation. Retries with the same key return or repair the existing queued job instead of creating a duplicate sweep.
idempotency_key.title: Idempotency Key

CurrentUserResponse.description:
Response schema for the authenticated user endpoint.

``features`` and ``usage`` are computed fields that do not correspond to
database columns on the User model.  Callers must construct this response
explicitly (see ``BacktestService.to_current_user_response``) rather than
passing an ORM User object directly - ``from_attributes`` is enabled only
for the flat scalar fields inherited from the User row.
CurrentUserResponse.title: CurrentUserResponse

CustomLegDefinition.description: User-defined leg for custom N-leg strategies.

expiration_date.description: Optional explicit expiration date for option legs. When set, the builder resolves this exact date instead of using expiration_offset.
expiration_date.title: Expiration Date

strike_offset.description: Strike offset from ATM in listed-strike steps. 0=ATM, +1=one OTM call step, -1=one OTM put step.
strike_offset.title: Strike Offset

strike_selection.description: Optional explicit strike selection for custom option legs. When set, the builder ignores strike_offset for strike resolution.

CustomLegDefinition.title: CustomLegDefinition

JobStatus.description: Status values for jobs that support expiration (exports).
JobStatus.title: JobStatus

LandscapeCell.description:
Metrics use float (not Decimal) because they are read from JSONB storage.
PostgreSQL JSONB does not preserve Decimal; values arrive as floats.
BacktestSummaryResponse uses Decimal for API responses; this schema reflects DB shape.
LandscapeCell.title: LandscapeCell

SpreadWidthConfig-Input.description: Configuration for how wide a spread's wings are.
SpreadWidthConfig-Input.title: SpreadWidthConfig

SpreadWidthConfig-Output.description: Configuration for how wide a spread's wings are.
SpreadWidthConfig-Output.title: SpreadWidthConfig

SpreadWidthMode.description: How to determine the width of a spread (distance between short and long strikes).
SpreadWidthMode.title: SpreadWidthMode

StrategyOverrides-Input.description:
Optional overrides for how a strategy selects strikes and widths.

Named fields correspond to standard leg roles. Strategies ignore fields
that don't apply to them (e.g., a long call ignores ``short_call_strike``).

calendar_contract_type.description: Override the option type used by calendar_spread. Defaults to 'call'.
calendar_contract_type.title: Calendar Contract Type

long_call_strike.description: Override long call placement (for diagonals, PMCC)

spread_width.description: Override wing/spread width for strategies with protection legs

StrategyOverrides-Input.title: StrategyOverrides

StrategyOverrides-Output.description:
Optional overrides for how a strategy selects strikes and widths.

Named fields correspond to standard leg roles. Strategies ignore fields
that don't apply to them (e.g., a long call ignores ``short_call_strike``).

calendar_contract_type.description: Override the option type used by calendar_spread. Defaults to 'call'.
calendar_contract_type.title: Calendar Contract Type

long_call_strike.description: Override long call placement (for diagonals, PMCC)

spread_width.description: Override wing/spread width for strategies with protection legs

StrategyOverrides-Output.title: StrategyOverrides

StrikeSelection-Input.description: Configuration for where a strategy leg's strike is placed relative to the underlying.

value.description: Interpretation depends on mode: pct_from_spot -> percentage, atm_offset_steps -> integer steps, delta_target -> absolute delta (0-100).
value.title: Value

StrikeSelection-Input.title: StrikeSelection

StrikeSelection-Output.description: Configuration for where a strategy leg's strike is placed relative to the underlying.

value.description: Interpretation depends on mode: pct_from_spot -> percentage, atm_offset_steps -> integer steps, delta_target -> absolute delta (0-100).
value.title: Value

StrikeSelection-Output.title: StrikeSelection

StrikeSelectionMode.description: How to choose a strike for a strategy leg.
StrikeSelectionMode.title: StrikeSelectionMode

next_cursor.title: Next Cursor

total.description: Total number of matching records for the current filters before page slicing. This value does not shrink after applying a cursor.
total.title: Total

total.description: Total number of matching records for the current filters before page slicing. This value does not shrink after applying a cursor.
total.title: Total

TemplateConfig-Input.description: The reusable portion of a backtest configuration - everything except symbol and dates.

strategy_overrides.description: Optional strategy-specific overrides such as put-calendar selection.

TemplateConfig-Input.title: TemplateConfig

TemplateConfig-Output.description: The reusable portion of a backtest configuration - everything except symbol and dates.

strategy_overrides.description: Optional strategy-specific overrides such as put-calendar selection.

TemplateConfig-Output.title: TemplateConfig

TradeJsonResponse.description:
Trade response model for JSON-serialized trades (scan/sweep recommendations).

Unlike ``BacktestTradeResponse``, this model does NOT require ``id`` because
trades stored as JSON blobs inside recommendation rows have no individual
database primary key.

detail_json.description: Trade leg details. May be large for multi-leg strategies.
detail_json.title: Detail Json

entry_mid.description: Per-unit position value divided by 100 (contract multiplier). NOT the raw option mid-price.
entry_mid.title: Entry Mid

exit_mid.description: Per-unit position value at exit divided by 100. Same convention as entry_mid.
exit_mid.title: Exit Mid

holding_period_days.description: Calendar days between entry and exit dates.
holding_period_days.title: Holding Period Days

TradeJsonResponse.title: TradeJsonResponse

WebhookResponse.description: Typed response for the Stripe webhook endpoint.
WebhookResponse.title: WebhookResponse

delete.description:
Delete the current user's account and all associated data.

Requires the ``X-Confirm-Delete: permanently-delete-my-account`` header
to prevent accidental deletions. This is a destructive, irreversible
operation. Cascade deletes handle child records via ON DELETE CASCADE.

Also cancels any active Stripe subscription and deletes the Stripe
customer object to stop billing immediately.

422.description: Validation error - request payload did not match the expected schema.

429.description: Rate limit exceeded. See Retry-After header.

get.description:

Each entity type has its own offset parameter for independent pagination.
Returns totals so the client can determine if additional pages exist.
